items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5，專為編碼與代理式工作優化
items_flat.summary_en: xAI announced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, trained alongside Cursor data on tens of thousands of NVIDIA GB300 GPUs. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, posting competitive results on SWE-Bench Pro, Terminal Bench and related coding benchmarks, with 80 TPS inference and roughly 2x token efficiency versus peers. Priced at $2/M input and $6/M output tokens, it is available via the xAI API and is now the default in Grok Build.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 宣布推出迄今最強的 Grok 4.5，與 Cursor 資料共同訓練，使用數萬張 NVIDIA GB300 GPU。模型聚焦真實軟體工程、代理工作流與知識工作，在 SWE-Bench Pro、Terminal Bench 等編碼基準上表現具競爭力，推論速度 80 TPS，token 效率約為同級的兩倍。定價為每百萬輸入 $2、輸出 $6，已透過 xAI API 開放，並成為 Grok Build 的預設模型。
items_flat.analysis_en: This positions xAI as a serious contender in the coding-agent niche where cost and speed matter as much as raw capability. The explicit Cursor co-training and open pricing create immediate pressure on Claude and GPT coding tiers, though independent long-horizon agent evaluations remain the key open question.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此舉讓 xAI 在成本與速度並重的編碼代理賽道成為有力競爭者。與 Cursor 共同訓練及公開定價直接對 Claude 與 GPT 的編碼方案形成壓力，但獨立的長時程代理評估仍是關鍵未解問題。
items_flat.quote: Today, we're launching Grok 4.5, SpaceXAI's smartest model built to excel at coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work. It's our strongest model ever and was trained alongside Cursor.
items_flat.quote_zh: 今日我們推出 Grok 4.5，SpaceXAI 迄今最強的模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。這是我們最強的模型，並與 Cursor 共同訓練。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs outline joint bioresilience approach
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布聯合生物韌性方案
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint approach to bioresilience, detailing how frontier AI models will support prevention, detection and response to biological threats. The plan covers partnerships with governments and biosecurity groups (more than 15 advanced in the past year), SynthID adaptation for biological sequences, AlphaEvolve for faster metagenomic detection, and access to Isomorphic’s Drug Design Engine for countermeasures.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布聯合生物韌性方法，說明前沿 AI 模型如何支援生物威脅的預防、偵測與回應。計畫涵蓋與政府及生物安全組織的合作（過去一年推進超過 15 項）、將 SynthID 應用於生物序列篩檢、以 AlphaEvolve 加速宏基因體偵測，以及提供 Isomorphic 藥物設計引擎協助應對措施。
items_flat.analysis_en: The post formalizes a dual-use posture that treats AI both as a potential risk amplifier and as essential infrastructure for biosecurity. Concrete tooling (SynthID for DNA, AlphaEvolve optimization) moves the discussion beyond high-level principles, yet the effectiveness of voluntary partnerships versus regulation remains untested.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此文正式確立雙重用途立場，將 AI 同時視為風險放大器與生物安全必要基礎設施。具體工具（DNA 的 SynthID、AlphaEvolve 優化）讓討論超越原則層次，但自願合作相對於監管的成效仍待驗證。
items_flat.quote: We need frontier AI models, and the scientific advances they will enable, to respond to these challenges and help make society more resilient to events like future outbreaks.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們需要前沿 AI 模型及其促成的科學進展，來應對這些挑戰，並幫助社會對未來疫情等事件更具韌性。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI releases GPT-Red for automated red-teaming and self-improvement
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 發布 GPT-Red 自動化紅隊與自我改進系統
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI introduced GPT-Red, an automated red-teaming model trained via self-play to discover vulnerabilities such as prompt injections. It was used to adversarially train GPT-5.6 Sol, cutting failures on hard direct prompt-injection benchmarks by roughly 6× versus earlier production models and achieving a 0.05% failure rate against GPT-Red itself. The system remains internal-only.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-Red，這是透過自我對弈訓練的自動化紅隊模型，專門發現提示注入等漏洞。它被用來對抗訓練 GPT-5.6 Sol，使困難直接提示注入基準的失敗率較先前生產模型降低約 6 倍，對 GPT-Red 本身的失敗率僅 0.05%。該系統僅限內部使用。
items_flat.analysis_en: Automated red-teaming at this scale creates a genuine safety flywheel, but keeping the attacker model internal limits external verification and raises questions about whether the same techniques can be safely shared with the broader research community.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此規模的自動化紅隊確實形成安全飛輪，但將攻擊模型保持內部限制了外部驗證，也讓人質疑相同技術能否安全地與更廣泛研究社群分享。
items_flat.quote: We trained GPT‑Red, an automated red-teaming model that scales our ability to find vulnerabilities so we can fix them before wider deployment.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們訓練了 GPT‑Red，這是一款自動化紅隊模型，能擴展我們發現漏洞的能力，以便在更廣泛部署前加以修復。

items_flat.title_en: Meta begins alerting parents when teens discuss self-harm with Meta AI
items_flat.title_zh: Meta 開始在青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷時通知家長
items_flat.summary_en: Meta announced that parents using Instagram supervision tools will now receive alerts if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI. Flagged conversations undergo manual review; the feature is live in the US, UK, Australia and Canada and will expand globally by year-end. Meta also continues directing teens to crisis resources and is building pathways to contact emergency services in imminent-risk cases.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta 宣布，使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷，現將收到通知。被標記的對話會經人工審核；功能已在美國、英國、澳洲與加拿大上線，預計年底前全球擴展。Meta 同時持續引導青少年使用危機資源，並建立在緊急風險時聯繫緊急服務的管道。
items_flat.analysis_en: The move balances teen privacy against parental duty of care and sets a concrete industry precedent for AI companion safety. Success will depend on false-positive rates and whether teens simply migrate to less-supervised chatbots.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此舉在青少年隱私與家長照護責任之間取得平衡，並為 AI 陪伴安全樹立具體產業先例。成敗將取決於誤報率，以及青少年是否轉向監管較少的聊天機器人。
items_flat.quote: Parents using Instagram supervision tools will now be notified if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI.
items_flat.quote_zh: 使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷，現將收到通知。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI raises ChatGPT custom instructions limit to 5,000 characters
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令上限提高至 5,000 字元
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI increased the character limit for custom instructions in ChatGPT from 1,500 to 5,000 for Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education users, allowing more detailed and persistent user personas. Free and Go tiers remain at 1,500 characters.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令字元上限從 1,500 提高至 5,000，適用於 Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶，可支援更詳細且持久的使用者人設。免費與 Go 方案仍維持 1,500 字元。
items_flat.analysis_en: A quiet but practical quality-of-life upgrade that reduces the need for users to re-state context every session. It also widens the capability gap between free and paid tiers without changing model weights.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這是安靜但實用的使用體驗升級，減少用戶每場對話重新陳述上下文的需要，同時在不更動模型權重的情況下拉大免費與付費方案的能力差距。
items_flat.quote: Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business, and Education users can now save up to 5,000 characters.
items_flat.quote_zh: Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶現可儲存最多 5,000 字元。

xai.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
xai.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5，專為編碼與代理式工作優化
xai.summary_en: xAI announced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, trained alongside Cursor data on tens of thousands of NVIDIA GB300 GPUs. xai.quote: Today, we're launching Grok 4.5, SpaceXAI's smartest model built to excel at coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work. It's our strongest model ever and was trained alongside Cursor.
xai.quote_zh: 今日我們推出 Grok 4.5，SpaceXAI 迄今最強的模型，專為編碼、代理任務與知識工作打造。這是我們最強的模型，並與 Cursor 共同訓練。

brief_en: xAI launched Grok 4.5 for coding and agents; Google DeepMind detailed bioresilience plans with Isomorphic Labs; OpenAI released GPT-Red for automated red-teaming that hardened GPT-5.6 Sol; Meta began parental alerts for teen self-harm chats with Meta AI; OpenAI raised ChatGPT custom instructions to 5,000 characters.
brief_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5 主打編碼與代理；Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 公布生物韌性方案；OpenAI 發布 GPT-Red 自動化紅隊並強化 GPT-5.6 Sol；Meta 啟動青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷時通知家長；OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令上限調至 5,000 字元。
